name: SwitchAI
description: AI agent for Italian energy tariff comparison. Analyzes ARERA 2.0 utility bills, compares 44+ live offers for electricity (Luce) and gas, live PUN/PSV market indices. Includes honesty system and bill attualization. switchai.it

tools.name: calculate_energy_savings
tools.description: Compare Italian energy tariffs and calculate annual savings. Returns top 3 offers with cost breakdown and subscription URL in markdown format.

tools.name: parse_energy_bill
tools.description: Extract structured data from Italian ARERA 2.0 energy bills: supplier, POD/PDR, annual consumption, annual spend, tariff zone.

tools.name: get_available_offers
tools.description: List all available electricity (25) and gas (19) offers in the Italian free market with pricing and contract details.

tools.name: get_market_indices
tools.description: Current PUN (electricity) and PSV (gas) market indices, updated daily from public source.

tools.name: get_subscription_form_schema
tools.description: JSON schema of the subscription form: required fields, valid enums, 4-step wizard structure.

tools.name: submit_subscription
tools.description: Submit a tariff activation request. Supports dry_run: true for preview. GDPR double opt-in: user must confirm via email link.

tools.name: get_subscription_status
tools.description: Check the status of a submitted subscription by ID.
